=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (12:28-12:32) TS377094: This Schema class is constructed with `new`. `User.make(...)` can be used to construct the Schema class instance. effect(newSchemaClass)
  Fix 0: "Disable newSchemaClass for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable newSchemaClass for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with .make"

[D2] (15:14-15:18) TS377094: This Schema class is constructed with `new`. `User.make(...)` can be used to construct the Schema class instance. effect(newSchemaClass)
  Fix 0: "Disable newSchemaClass for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable newSchemaClass for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with .make"

[D3] (19:30-19:34) TS377094: This Schema class is constructed with `new`. `User.make(...)` can be used to construct the Schema class instance. effect(newSchemaClass)
  Fix 0: "Disable newSchemaClass for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable newSchemaClass for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with .make"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable newSchemaClass for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable newSchemaClass for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Replace with .make" ===

--- file:///.src/newSchemaClass.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics newSchemaClass:suggestion
import { Effect, Schema } from "effect"

class User extends Schema.Class<User>("User")({
  name: Schema.String
}) {}

const PlainSchema = Schema.Struct({
  name: Schema.String
})

export const newUser = User.make({ name: "John" })

export const newInsideEffect = Effect.gen(function*() {
  return new User({ name: "Jane" })
})

export const nestedFunction = Effect.gen(function*() {
  const makeUser = () => new User({ name: "Nested" })
  return makeUser
})

export const plainSchemaInGen = Effect.gen(function*() {
  const user = PlainSchema.make({ name: "Struct" })
  return user
})

class RegularUser {
  constructor(readonly name: string) {}
}

export const regular = new RegularUser("Regular")


=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable newSchemaClass for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable newSchemaClass for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Replace with .make" ===

--- file:///.src/newSchemaClass.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics newSchemaClass:suggestion
import { Effect, Schema } from "effect"

class User extends Schema.Class<User>("User")({
  name: Schema.String
}) {}

const PlainSchema = Schema.Struct({
  name: Schema.String
})

export const newUser = new User({ name: "John" })

export const newInsideEffect = Effect.gen(function*() {
  return User.make({ name: "Jane" })
})

export const nestedFunction = Effect.gen(function*() {
  const makeUser = () => new User({ name: "Nested" })
  return makeUser
})

export const plainSchemaInGen = Effect.gen(function*() {
  const user = PlainSchema.make({ name: "Struct" })
  return user
})

class RegularUser {
  constructor(readonly name: string) {}
}

export const regular = new RegularUser("Regular")


=== [D3] Fix 0: "Disable newSchemaClass for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 1: "Disable newSchemaClass for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 2: "Replace with .make" ===

--- file:///.src/newSchemaClass.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics newSchemaClass:suggestion
import { Effect, Schema } from "effect"

class User extends Schema.Class<User>("User")({
  name: Schema.String
}) {}

const PlainSchema = Schema.Struct({
  name: Schema.String
})

export const newUser = new User({ name: "John" })

export const newInsideEffect = Effect.gen(function*() {
  return new User({ name: "Jane" })
})

export const nestedFunction = Effect.gen(function*() {
  const makeUser = () => User.make({ name: "Nested" })
  return makeUser
})

export const plainSchemaInGen = Effect.gen(function*() {
  const user = PlainSchema.make({ name: "Struct" })
  return user
})

class RegularUser {
  constructor(readonly name: string) {}
}

export const regular = new RegularUser("Regular")
